word: G4838 - συμπαραλαμβάνω - symparalambánō - soom-par-al-am-ban'-o - Take with

sections.paragraph:
- Original: συμπαραλαμβάνω

- Transliteration: Sumparalambano

- Phonetic: soom-par-al-am-ban'-o

- Definition:

1. to take along together with

2. in the NT to take with one as a companion

- Origin: from G4862 and G3880

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4862 and G3880; to take along in company: - take with.
